support_safe_status_summary: Activation remains ready and the voiced reply carries forward the prior support-safe context.

transcript.transcript_summary: Owner asks whether the same activation session can continue after yesterday's confirmed handoff.
transcript.intent_summary: Continue the activation-ready conversation with support-safe carryover context.

reply.reply_summary: Confirms the session carryover and summarizes the next activation handoff step without replaying raw transcript.

continuity.carryover_summary: Carries forward the previous activation-ready checkpoint and support-safe session context.
